content.json:
🛡️ Diagnostic Settings Manager

Built by itprofessor.cloud  |  Use this workbook to onboard Azure resources to Microsoft Sentinel by configuring diagnostic settings. Select resources from each tab and apply diagnostics using the buttons. Applying settings to already-configured resources is safe and idempotent.

> **Networking Resources** - Select one or more resources below, then use the buttons to apply diagnostic settings to your Sentinel workspace. Resources are listed from ARG; apply settings regardless of current state.

content.query:
Resources
| where type in~ (
    "microsoft.network/networksecuritygroups",
    "microsoft.network/publicipaddresses",
    "microsoft.network/virtualnetworks",
    "microsoft.network/azurefirewalls",
    "microsoft.network/loadbalancers",
    "microsoft.network/applicationgateways",
    "microsoft.network/virtualnetworkgateways",
    "microsoft.network/bastionhosts"
)
| where resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroup:value})
| extend resourceId = tolower(id)
| join kind=leftouter (
    PolicyResources
    | where type =~ 'microsoft.policyinsights/policystates'
    | where properties.policyDefinitionAction =~ 'deployIfNotExists'
    | where tolower(tostring(properties.resourceType)) in~ (
    "microsoft.network/networksecuritygroups",
    "microsoft.network/publicipaddresses",
    "microsoft.network/virtualnetworks",
    "microsoft.network/azurefirewalls",
    "microsoft.network/loadbalancers",
    "microsoft.network/applicationgateways",
    "microsoft.network/virtualnetworkgateways",
    "microsoft.network/bastionhosts"
    )
    | where tostring(properties.complianceState) =~ 'Compliant'
    | project resourceId = tolower(tostring(properties.resourceId))
) on resourceId
| where isempty(resourceId1)
| project subscriptionId, Resource=id, name, resourceGroup, location, type
content.title: Networking - Select Resources
content.noDataMessage: ✅ No networking resources found in the selected scope.

content.json:
### ➕ Add Diagnostic Settings

1. Select rows (checkboxes) from the grid above.

| Button | Logs | Metrics |
|--------|------|--------|
| 📋 Logs Only | `allLogs` | ❌ |
| 📊 Metrics Only | ❌ | `AllMetrics` |
| 📋📊 All | `allLogs` | `AllMetrics` |

> Setting name: `Sentinel-Diagnostics`

armActionContext.title: Add Logs + Metrics
armActionContext.description: Creates Sentinel-Diagnostics with allLogs and AllMetrics.

armActionContext.title: Remove Diagnostic Setting
armActionContext.description: Deletes the Sentinel-Diagnostics diagnostic setting from the selected resources. Only removes the setting named 'Sentinel-Diagnostics'.

content.json: > **Storage Resources** - Select storage accounts from each grid below, then click the button to configure diagnostics for that sub-service (Blob, File, Queue, Table). Each sub-service must be configured separately.

content.query:
Resources
| where type in~ (
    "microsoft.storage/storageaccounts"
)
| where resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroup:value})
| extend resourceId = tolower(id)
| join kind=leftouter (
    PolicyResources
    | where type =~ 'microsoft.policyinsights/policystates'
    | where properties.policyDefinitionAction =~ 'deployIfNotExists'
    | where tolower(tostring(properties.resourceType)) in~ (
    "microsoft.storage/storageaccounts"
    )
    | where tostring(properties.complianceState) =~ 'Compliant'
    | project resourceId = tolower(tostring(properties.resourceId))
) on resourceId
| where isempty(resourceId1)
| project subscriptionId, Resource=id, name, resourceGroup, location, type
content.title: Blob - Select Storage Accounts
content.noDataMessage: ✅ No storage accounts found in the selected scope.

armActionContext.title: Enable Blob Diagnostics
armActionContext.body: {"properties": {"workspaceId": "{WorkspaceId}", "logs": [{"category": "StorageRead", "enabled": true, "retentionPolicy": {"days": 0, "enabled": false}}, {"category": "StorageWrite", "enabled": true, "retentionPolicy": {"days": 0, "enabled": false}}, {"category": "StorageDelete", "enabled": true, "retentionPolicy": {"days": 0, "enabled": false}}], "metrics": [{"category": "Transaction", "enabled": true, "retentionPolicy": {"days": 0, "enabled": false}}]}}

armActionContext.title: Remove Diagnostic Setting
armActionContext.description: Deletes the Sentinel-Diagnostics diagnostic setting from the selected resources. Only removes the setting named 'Sentinel-Diagnostics'.

content.json: > **Parent AllMetrics** - Uses the Blob grid selection. Applies AllMetrics to the parent storage account.

armActionContext.title: Remove Diagnostic Setting
armActionContext.description: Deletes the Sentinel-Diagnostics diagnostic setting from the selected resources. Only removes the setting named 'Sentinel-Diagnostics'.

content.json: > **Apps & Other Resources** - Select resources below and apply diagnostic settings. Covers Logic Apps, Web Apps, Automation Accounts, API Management, and Key Vaults.

content.query:
Resources
| where type in~ (
    "microsoft.web/sites",
    "microsoft.logic/workflows",
    "microsoft.automation/automationaccounts",
    "microsoft.apimanagement/service",
    "microsoft.keyvault/vaults"
)
| where resourceGroup in~ ({ResourceGroup:value})
| extend resourceId = tolower(id)
| join kind=leftouter (
    PolicyResources
    | where type =~ 'microsoft.policyinsights/policystates'
    | where properties.policyDefinitionAction =~ 'deployIfNotExists'
    | where tolower(tostring(properties.resourceType)) in~ (
    "microsoft.web/sites",
    "microsoft.logic/workflows",
    "microsoft.automation/automationaccounts",
    "microsoft.apimanagement/service",
    "microsoft.keyvault/vaults"
    )
    | where tostring(properties.complianceState) =~ 'Compliant'
    | project resourceId = tolower(tostring(properties.resourceId))
) on resourceId
| where isempty(resourceId1)
| project subscriptionId, Resource=id, name, resourceGroup, location, type
content.title: Apps & Other - Select Resources
content.noDataMessage: ✅ No app resources found in the selected scope.
